primary_colors: warm white, soft gray, greige, stone, off-white, linen
design_context.lighting_mood: bright natural daylight, large windows, airy open space, sunlit, fresh atmosphere
design_context.overall_description: Neutral Classic color palette. Bright & Airy atmosphere.

16bdacfe-4c3e-4a0d-9462-aadb061a08ed.generated_prompt: A sun-drenched, airy 3D interior visualization render of a modern master bedroom, captured from a cinematic camera perspective looking towards the king-sized bed, showcasing the generous depth of the room. Bright natural daylight streams through expansive, floor-to-ceiling windows on the far wall, illuminating the space with a fresh atmosphere and creating soft, elongated shadows on the off-white polished concrete flooring. The walls are finished in a smooth, warm white Venetian plaster, meeting a perfectly flat, unadorned 10-foot ceiling also in warm white. A sleek, low-profile king bed is centrally positioned against the back wall, featuring an upholstered headboard in a greige linen fabric with clean, rectilinear stitching. On either side of the bed, minimalist nightstands crafted from honed Pietra Grey marble with a subtle vein pattern are placed equidistant from the bed and the edges of the room, each topped with a delicate, geometric task lamp in brushed steel with a translucent, soft gray glass shade. The entire scene is rendered with impeccable clean geometry, precise material textures, and volumetric lighting that emphasizes the bright, open plan of the room, exuding a luxurious yet understated modern aesthetic.
